---
title: "新闻"
lang: zh
---

- **2026.01:** 我们的论文“Memristive cellular neural networks for fast in-pixel computing”发表于 **_Nature Electronics_**。论文链接：[Ravichandran et al., _Nat. Electron._ 9, (2026)](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41928-025-01555-3)。相关报道：EurekAlert [链接](https://www.eurekalert.org/news-releases/1113506)、ScienMag [链接](https://scienmag.com/accelerating-in-pixel-computing-with-memristive-neural-networks/)、Research Briefing [链接](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41928-025-01559-z)。  
  _Nature Electronics_ 的编辑评论文章“Memristors march on”：[链接](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41928-026-01587-3)。

- **2026.01:** 我们的论文“Event-based neuromorphic sensing system with flexible haptic sensors and a memristive system on a chip”发表于 **_Nature Sensors_**。论文链接：[Zhao et al., _Nat. Sens._ 1, 163–171 (2026)](https://www.nature.com/articles/s44460-025-00013-z)。相关报道：TechXplore [链接](https://techxplore.com/news/2026-01-analog-hardware-internet-bottlenecks.html)、News & Views [链接](https://www.nature.com/articles/s44460-025-00025-9)、Behind the Paper [链接](https://communities.springernature.com/posts/bringing-intelligence-to-sensors-an-event-based-neuromorphic-sensing-system)。

- **2025.08:** 我顺利完成博士论文答辩。

- **2025.07:** 我们的论文“Radiofrequency signal processing with a memristive system-on-a-chip”以封面文章发表于 **_Nature Electronics_**。论文链接：[Huang et al., _Nat Electron_ 8, 587–596 (2025)](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41928-025-01409-y)。相关报道：_Nature Electronics_ 封面专栏 [链接](https://www.nature.com/natelectron/volumes/8/issues/7)、UMass 新闻 [链接](https://www.umass.edu/engineering/news/qiangfei-xia-nature-electronics)、TechXplore [链接](https://techxplore.com/news/2025-07-memristor-based-boost-radiofrequency.html)、Behind the Paper [链接](https://communities.springernature.com/posts/memristive-system-on-a-chip-for-intelligent-wireless-communications)。
